subject: docs(todo): remove shipped backend item — resolved_at server-side stamping
body:
Verified against devmade-ai/tool-till-tees:
lib/routes/sancio/proposals.ts:222 sets
`resolved_at: new Date().toISOString()` on the server in the
proposal-resolution handler, and frontend no longer falls back to
client `new Date()` — only reads `proposal.resolved_at` from the type
(ProposalCard.tsx:30). Item is shipped.

Other backend TODO items re-verified and left intact:
- bulk /api/sancio/module-versions (still /:id/versions only)
- clear passphrase_hash after verify (update still sets only counterparty_id)
- email CHECK constraint (counterparty_email is plain TEXT)
- template_id FK (still TEXT, no REFERENCES)
- invite handler transaction (DB update + "non-fatal" email send)
- cron archive read notifications (not in cron.ts)

Tags: documentation, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-hardening
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Qj2ueAEuobTogrBRFwAXvc
title: remove shipped backend item — resolved_at server-side stamping
